The '''''Night Raider''''' was a [[Ghtroc Industries/Legends|Ghtroc Industries]] [[720 light freighter/Legends|720 light freighter]] captained and presumably owned by a [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] named [[Yarrku]]. It was destroyed in space battle by [[Kinnin Vo-Shay]].<ref name="TLH" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|13|The Last Hand (short story)}}
